memoryArtifacts.headline: Short life sketch
memoryArtifacts.description: As a knight he fought in the French and Scottish wars. He became the first Lord of Bardolf on the 29th of November 1295.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
Baron Bardolf, Sir Hugh of Wormgay

Hugh was the son of William Bardolf and Julian de Gournay. Grandson of William and Nichola Bardolf, Hugh de Gournay and Mathilda.

He married Isabel Aguillon, the d …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph於1259年9月29日出生在英國諾福爾可喬加時，他的父親William Bardolf of Wormegay31歲，母親Lady Juliana de Gournay28歲。他於1281年與Isabel d'Aguillon在英國英格蘭素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1304年9月20日在英國諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾盧曉拉福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph于1259年9月29日出生在英国諾福爾可喬加时，他的父亲William Bardolf of Wormegay31岁，母亲Lady Juliana de Gournay28岁。他于1281年与Isabel d'Aguillon在英国英格兰素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1304年9月20日在英国諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾盧曉拉福。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph was born on 29 September 1259, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, his father, William Bardolf of Wormegay, was 31 and his mother, Lady Juliana de Gournay, was 28. He married Isabel d'Aguillon in 1281, in Addington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 20 September 1304, in Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Rushcliffe, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph est né le 29 septembre 1259, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Bardolf of Wormegay, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Juliana de Gournay, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Isabel d'Aguillon en 1281, à Addington, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1304, à Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Rushcliffe, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph am 29. September 1259 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bardolf of Wormegay 31 und seine Mutter Lady Juliana de Gournay 28. Er hat 1281 in Addington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Isabel d'Aguillon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. September 1304 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Rushcliffe, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph è nato il il 29 settembre 1259 nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, William Bardolf of Wormegay, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Juliana de Gournay, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Isabel d'Aguillon nel 1281, nel Addington, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 settembre 1304, nel Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Rushcliffe, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolphが1259年9月29日にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイで生まれた時，父William Bardolf of Wormegayは31歳，母Lady Juliana de Gournayは28歳であった。1281年にイギリスイギリススリーアッドイントンでIsabel d'Aguillonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1304年9月20日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアシェルフォードで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアルシュクリフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph(이)가 1259년 9월 29일 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bardolf of Wormegay(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Juliana de Gournay(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 애딩턴에서 Isabel d'Aguillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1304년 9월 20일 영국 노틴그함실르 셸퍼드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 러스hc리프에 묻혔다.

pt.29 September 1259–20 September 1304: 29 de setembro de 1259–20 de setembro de 1304
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1259, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Bardolf of Wormegay, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Juliana de Gournay, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel d'Aguillon em 1281, em Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1304, em Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Rushcliffe, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph родился 29 сентября 1259 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Bardolf of Wormegay было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Juliana de Gournay, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel d'Aguillon в 1281 г. в местности аддингтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 сентября 1304 г. в местности шелфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности рушклифф, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.29 September 1259–20 September 1304: 29 de septiembre de 1259–20 de septiembre de 1304
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Bardolf 1st Baron Bardolph nació el 29 de septiembre de 1259, en Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Bardolf of Wormegay, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Juliana de Gournay, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Isabel d'Aguillon en 1281, en Addington, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1304, en Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Rushcliffe, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
